message:
docs: fix stale namepool comments — polecats are persistent, not nuke-per-task

The namepool comments still described the pre-gt-4ac model where polecats
were spawned fresh and nuked after each task. Updated to reflect the
persistent polecat pool where polecats cycle IDLE → WORKING → DONE → IDLE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
